parameters.content:
## AI Resume Optimizer & ATS Enhancer

**Flow:**
1. User submits form: Job Description + Resume (PDF only) + Name + Email
2. Resume text extracted from PDF
3. AI analyzes Job Description for keywords & requirements
4. AI rewrites resume + generates full ATS report
5. Resume converted to PDF via html2pdf.app
6. Email sent with optimized PDF attached + full ATS report in body
7. Confirmation screen shown on form page

**Required Setup:**
- Mistral Cloud API Key credential (model: mistral-large-latest)
- Gmail OAuth2 credential
- html2pdf.app API key (free at https://html2pdf.app)

**What the ATS Report includes:**
- ATS compatibility score with breakdown
- Matched keywords from job description
- Qualification gaps
- Skills to learn (with reasons)
- Projects to build (with descriptions)
- Certifications to pursue
- Resume improvement recommendations

**Notes:**
- PDF only — ask users to export Word docs as PDF before uploading
- AI never fabricates experience — only reframes existing content
- Score above 90% is intentionally rare and realistic

parameters.formDescription: =Upload your resume as a PDF and paste the job description. Our AI will rewrite your resume for ATS and email you a full improvement report.

values.placeholder: Paste the full job description here including requirements, responsibilities, and qualifications...

parameters.text:
=You are a senior technical recruiter and ATS specialist performing deep job description analysis.

ANALYZE this job description with extreme precision:

---
{{ $json.jobDescription }}
---

Extract and return ONLY this JSON structure — no other text:

{
  "job_title": "exact job title as written in the JD",
  "company_signals": "brief note on company culture/environment inferred from JD",
  "experience_level": "entry | mid | senior | lead | principal | executive",
  "years_required": "e.g. 3-5 years or 'not specified'",
  "required_skills": ["skill exactly as written in JD"],
  "preferred_skills": ["nice-to-have skill from JD"],
  "ats_keywords": ["high-value ATS keyword or exact phrase from JD"],
  "action_verbs": ["strong action verbs used in responsibilities section"],
  "responsibilities": ["key responsibility from JD"],
  "qualifications": ["qualification requirement from JD"],
  "tools_and_technologies": ["specific tools, platforms, languages, frameworks mentioned"],
  "soft_skills": ["soft skills or behavioral competencies mentioned"],
  "industry": "industry or domain",
  "key_phrases": ["exact multi-word phrases from JD that should appear in resume"],
  "red_flags": ["any unusual or problematic requirements"]
}

messageValues.message:
You are a senior technical recruiter and ATS specialist with 15+ years of experience.

Your job is to perform a DEEP, STRUCTURED analysis of the provided job description. You are NOT rewriting anything — only extracting intelligence that will be used to optimize the candidate's resume.

## EXTRACTION RULES
- Extract ALL explicitly stated requirements
- Distinguish between MUST-HAVE vs NICE-TO-HAVE
- Identify EXACT keywords and phrases that ATS systems will scan for
- Infer seniority level from context clues
- Identify culture signals if present
- Extract action keywords from responsibilities

## OUTPUT RULES
- Your ENTIRE response must be a single raw JSON object
- NO code fences, NO backticks, NO markdown, NO prose
- NO trailing commas
- Response MUST start with { and end with }

parameters.text:
=You are an elite resume strategist performing comprehensive ATS optimization.

## CANDIDATE INFORMATION

**Name:** {{ $('Resume Optimizer Form').item.json['Candidate Name'] }}

## ORIGINAL RESUME
```
{{ $('Normalize PDF Output').item.json.resumeText }}
```

## JD INTELLIGENCE REPORT
```json
{{ JSON.stringify($json.jdAnalysis, null, 2) }}
```

## FULL JOB DESCRIPTION
```
{{ $('Resume Optimizer Form').item.json['Job Description'] }}
```

---

## YOUR TASKS

**TASK 1 — RESUME REWRITE**
Rewrite the entire resume to maximize ATS match for this specific role.

**TASK 2 — ATS ANALYSIS REPORT**
Generate a comprehensive improvement report. Be specific and honest.

---

Return ONLY this exact JSON object:

{
  "candidate_name": "name",
  "target_role": "job title from JD",
  "optimized_resume": {
    "summary": "3-4 sentence executive summary with ATS keywords",
    "skills": {
      "primary": ["JD-matching skills"],
      "secondary": ["other relevant skills"]
    },
    "experience": [
      {
        "title": "Exact job title from original",
        "company": "Exact company name",
        "dates": "Exact dates — NEVER change",
        "bullets": ["[Action Verb] [what you did] [result]"]
      }
    ],
    "education": [
      {
        "degree": "Exact degree",
        "institution": "Exact institution",
        "year": "Graduation year",
        "details": "GPA/honors if in original"
      }
    ],
    "certifications": ["Certification from original resume"]
  },
  "ats_score_estimate": "XX% — one sentence honest rationale",
  "ats_score_breakdown": {
    "keyword_match": "XX/40 — explanation",
    "experience_relevance": "XX/30 — explanation",
    "seniority_alignment": "XX/20 — explanation",
    "education_match": "XX/10 — explanation"
  },
  "keyword_matches": ["JD keyword in optimized resume"],
  "missing_qualifications": ["Specific gap and impact"],
  "recommendations": ["Actionable improvement to resume"],
  "skills_to_learn": ["Skill — why critical — resource — timeframe"],
  "projects_to_build": ["Project — what it demonstrates — tech — time"],
  "certifications_to_pursue": ["Cert — issuer — why it helps — time/cost"]
}

messageValues.message:
You are an elite resume strategist and ATS optimization expert.

## ABSOLUTE RULES (NEVER VIOLATE)
- NEVER invent job titles, companies, dates, metrics, tools, certifications
- NEVER add experience the candidate does not have
- NEVER change employment dates
- If a required skill is absent, flag it as a gap — do NOT add it
- Only reframe what already exists

## RESUME REWRITE STANDARDS
- Summary: 3-4 sentences, embed 2-3 high-value ATS keywords
- Skills: PRIMARY = present in resume AND matching JD; SECONDARY = remaining relevant skills
- Experience bullets: [Strong Action Verb] + [What You Did] + [Measurable Result]
- Use exact JD terminology

## SCORING METHODOLOGY (be realistic)
- Scores above 85% are RARE
- Be honest — a 62% with clear guidance beats an inflated 88%

## OUTPUT RULES
- ENTIRE response must be a single raw JSON object
- NO code fences, NO markdown, NO trailing commas
- Response MUST start with { and end with }
